   "source": [
    "# ピーク検出: 基本\n",
    "\n",
    "[![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/tatsuki-washimi/gwexpy/blob/main/docs/web/en/user_guide/tutorials/advanced_peak_detection.ipynb)\n",
    "\n",
    "`gwexpy` では、`TimeSeries` や `FrequencySeries` に含まれる信号のピークを簡単に検出するための `find_peaks` メソッドを提供しています。これは内部的に `scipy.signal.find_peaks` をラップしていますが、物理単位（Hz, 秒など）を用いた直感的なパラメータ指定が可能です。\n",
    "\n",
    "`find_peaks` メソッドは、以下の2つを返します。\n",
    "- **Peak Series**: ピーク点のみを抽出した新しい Series オブジェクト\n",
    "- **Properties**: scipy が返すピーク特性（プロミネンスや幅など）の辞書\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "c6a81618",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T13:50:25.353364Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T13:50:25.353054Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T13:50:33.174892Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T13:50:33.163199Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 7.828227,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T13:50:33.175960+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T13:50:25.347733+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=UserWarning)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=DeprecationWarning)\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "from astropy import units as u\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy import FrequencySeries, TimeSeries"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f8ceb344",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.008427,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T13:50:33.221360+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T13:50:33.212933+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 1. FrequencySeries でのピーク検出\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "cc16c84b",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T13:50:33.249065Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T13:50:33.248594Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T13:50:33.980105Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T13:50:33.978276Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.7482,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T13:50:33.981087+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T13:50:33.232887+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1000x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Create mock data\n",
    "df = 0.5 * u.Hz\n",
    "f_axis = np.arange(0, 500, df.value) * u.Hz\n",
    "data = np.exp(-f_axis.value / 100) + np.random.normal(0, 0.05, len(f_axis))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Add peaks\n",
    "peak_freqs_true = [50, 60, 120, 125, 300] * u.Hz\n",
    "for f in peak_freqs_true:\n",
    "    idx = int(f.value / df.value)\n",
    "    data[idx] += 1.0\n",
    "\n",
    "spec = FrequencySeries(data, df=df, unit=\"V/Hz\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- Basic detection (threshold only) ---\n",
    "# peaks is returned as a FrequencySeries object\n",
    "peaks, _ = spec.find_peaks(threshold=0.5)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "plt.plot(spec, label=\"Spectrum\", alpha=0.7)\n",
    "plt.plot(peaks, \"x\", color=\"red\", label=\"Basic Peaks\")\n",
    "plt.title(\"Basic Peak Detection\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Frequency [Hz]\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Amplitude [V/Hz]\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "fdf6fdf0",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.01209,

    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 2. 物理単位による制約 (Distance & Width)\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "47cbce60",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T13:50:34.090010Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T13:50:34.089694Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T13:50:34.708805Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T13:50:34.707753Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.63118,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T13:50:34.712042+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T13:50:34.080862+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [

     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1000x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Detected peaks: [ 50. 125. 300.] Hz\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "dist_constraint = 20 * u.Hz\n",
    "peaks_adv, props = spec.find_peaks(threshold=0.5, distance=dist_constraint)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "plt.plot(spec, label=\"Spectrum\", alpha=0.7)\n",
    "plt.plot(peaks_adv, \"o\", color=\"orange\", label=\"Distance Constraint (20Hz)\")\n",
    "plt.title(f\"Peak Detection with Distance Constraint ({dist_constraint})\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Frequency [Hz]\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Amplitude [V/Hz]\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"Detected peaks: {peaks_adv.frequencies}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "d7b679f6",
   "metadata": {

     "status": "completed"

    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 3. TimeSeries でのピーク検出\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "fb3fcfcc",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T13:50:34.803610Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T13:50:34.803343Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T13:50:35.688944Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T13:50:35.685824Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.901519,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T13:50:35.690090+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T13:50:34.788571+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1000x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fs = 1024.0\n",
    "t = np.arange(0, 2.0, 1 / fs)\n",
    "ts_data = np.random.normal(0, 0.1, len(t))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Add pulses\n",
    "ts_data[int(0.5 * fs)] = 2.0\n",
    "ts_data[int(0.55 * fs)] = 1.8\n",
    "ts_data[int(1.2 * fs)] = 1.5\n",
    "\n",
    "ts = TimeSeries(ts_data, sample_rate=fs, unit=\"counts\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Ignore consecutive pulses within 0.1 seconds\n",
    "peaks_t, _ = ts.find_peaks(height=0.5, distance=0.1 * u.s)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "plt.plot(ts)\n",
    "plt.plot(peaks_t, \"v\", color=\"red\", label=\"Detected pulses (>100ms apart)\")\n",
    "plt.title(\"Pulse Detection in TimeSeries\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Time [s]\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Raw Counts\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  }
 ],
